_meta.source: Transcribed from the official rulebook digests: docs/specs/dark-souls/core-rules-digest.md (core p.8-9, p.32-37), darkroot-digest.md (p.10-11), four-kings-digest.md (p.7-9, p.14-15), old-iron-king-digest.md (p.14-15), kalameet-digest.md (p.14-15). Scope and exclusions per docs/specs/dark-souls.md.
_meta.crossCheck: All boss ids resolve against bosses.json and all named encounter ids resolve against encounters.json, EXCEPT 'pursuer' (Go Beyond Death Section 3 main boss), which has no entry in bosses.json and no assets in the mod - that scenario is excluded (spec section 1 / open question 8).
_meta.encounterCounts: Each section lists its exploration tiles in bonfire-out order: lower-level encounter cards are placed nearer the Bonfire tile, higher farther away (core p.9). The boss is not a tile; it is fought through the Fog Gate after the listed encounters.
_meta.undrawableL4: L4 cards whose spawns include UNKNOWN enemies (absent sets) are undrawable and must be redrawn (mega insert p.7; spec correction 4): hall-of-wraiths, new-londo-ruins, fortress-gates, blazing-furnace, royal-woods-passage.
openIssues: call-of-the-abyss needs 3 distinct L4 draws from the Four Kings L4 deck (1 in Section 4 + 2 in Section 5, and L4 encounters can never be replayed per four-kings p.8), but only 2 of the 4 Four Kings L4 cards are drawable in this mod (cursed-cavern, edge-of-the-abyss; hall-of-wraiths and new-londo-ruins spawn UNKNOWN enemies). Engine must either allow cross-deck L4 substitution for the third draw or the scenario cannot complete as printed. Flagged for the owner.

go-beyond-death is EXCLUDED (unshippable): requires the Explorers and Iron Keep enemy sets and the Pursuer boss, none present in the mod; additionally both of its prescribed named L4 encounters (fortress-gates, blazing-furnace) are undrawable. Sections are still encoded below for reference, behind excluded: true.

campaignOverlay.persistence: Souls, sparks, equipment, and character levels persist for the whole campaign unless spent or lost (core p.32). Persist: scenario/section cursor, discarded-forever treasure, L4 completion (core p.32-33, p.39; fk p.8).

sparks.start: Campaign starts with the standard spark count by player count (core p.33, table core p.8).
sparks.gainPerBoss: Each mini boss / main boss / mega boss defeated: party gains 1 spark (instead of resetting sparks) (core p.33).
sparks.purchase: Sparks purchasable from the Firekeeper: 2 souls per character in the group per spark, up to the starting maximum (core p.33).
sparks.joinLeave: Join mid-campaign: costs 1 spark; new character starts with starting stats/equipment; max sparks recalculated. Leaving: party gains 1 spark; equipment to inventory; max sparks recalculated (core p.33).

shopOverrides.treasureCost: Andre: treasure costs 2 souls per card (core p.33).
shopOverrides.sellback: Unwanted treasure can be sold back for 1 soul; sold treasure is discarded and can never be found again this campaign (core p.33).

levelTable.tier4: Tier 4 exists only in campaign; any stat at Tier 4 has value 40 (core p.33).

dashThrough.rule: Party may dash through non-boss encounters: enter the room, set up the encounter normally, enemies activate once (all enemy behaviours resolved); THEN the party may dash: immediately place characters on the entry nodes of a connected tile (core p.33).
dashThrough.effects: No souls awarded; no Health restored - all red cubes stay on endurance bars. Enemies are removed, the encounter card is turned face down, and the encounter must be fought (or dashed) again on re-entry (core p.33).
dashThrough.lockedDecision: Black cubes are also kept (core digest section 19; spec section 3.10).

campaignOverlay.multiBossAreas: Some areas contain two or more boss encounters; the party does not gain sparks or reset tiles until the FINAL boss of the area is defeated (core p.33).
campaignOverlay.end: Campaign ends when the party runs out of sparks or the final boss of the scenario is defeated (core p.33).

scenarios.name: Standard Game
scenarios.description: Classic single-dungeon game: exploration to a mini boss, full reset, exploration to a main boss (core p.8). Bosses are picked (or randomed) at setup; the encounter mix is dictated by the chosen boss's data card.

sections.name: Exploration & Mini Boss

encounters.note: Draw one encounter card per exploration tile (4 random of 6 tiles); levels come from the mini boss data card's Encounter Levels (bosses.json data.encounterIcons = [L1,L2,L3] counts). Lower levels nearer the Bonfire tile (core p.9).

specialRules: Place the Fog Gate token on an empty wall portion of the tile farthest (or tied farthest) from the Bonfire tile (core p.8).
Set spark dial: 1 player 5, 2 players 4, 3 players 3, 4 players 2 (core p.8).
The soul cache starts with 16 soul tokens in a 1-player game (0 otherwise) (core p.13).

sections.name: Exploration & Main Boss

encounters.note: Redo tile setup and sparks; draw encounters per the main boss data card's Encounter Levels (core p.9).

specialRules: ADD to the existing treasure deck: the five transposed treasure cards per chosen character plus five randomly selected legendary weapon cards (shuffle the 10 legendaries, pick 5). Shuffle the deck (core p.9). [Mod mapping: legendary pool = Transmuted Treasure deck, spec open question 4.]
After tile re-setup, place characters on the Bonfire tile; they rest without spending a spark before continuing (core p.15).
Main boss defeated: the players win the game (core p.28).

sections.name: Mega Boss Finale (optional toggle)

encounters.note: Exactly one level 4 encounter, drawn at random from the chosen mega boss expansion's four L4 cards, placed face down on the Mega Boss board, encounter side up, doorway aligned to a Bonfire doorway (mega insert p.7). If a revealed L4 card requires components you don't own, randomly draw a different one (mega insert p.7; undrawable ids in _meta.undrawableL4).

specialRules: Add main-boss treasure to inventory; box all tiles except the Bonfire tile. Reset sparks normally. Skip setup steps 5-7 (mega insert p.7).
Clearing the L4 encounter: remove all black and red cubes from endurance bars, add 8 souls per character to the soul cache (mega insert p.8).
Once defeated, an L4 encounter can never be replayed, and it does NOT reset when the party rests at the bonfire (mega insert p.8, p.14).

After the L4 encounter: characters go to the Bonfire tile. May visit Blacksmith Andre and/or the Firekeeper; no further exploration; no free rest (resting costs a spark). Clear the board, flip it to the mega-boss-spawn side, align doorway with Bonfire doorway, place the Fog Gate token on that doorway (mega insert p.9).
Defeating the mega boss wins the game; its treasure cards matter only in custom campaigns (mega insert p.12).

sections.name: Section 1 - Undead Burg
specialRules: Both Gargoyles must be defeated back-to-back to receive the Gargoyles' treasure. If defeated by the second Gargoyle, the party must fight BOTH again after returning to the Fog Gate (core p.35).
Multi-boss area: the party does not gain sparks or reset tiles until the final boss of the area is defeated (core p.33).

scenarios.name: Facing the Abyss
scenarios.source: darkroot rules insert p.10-11 (Dark Souls 1 themed)
scenarios.encounterDeckNote: The named Hydra Lake card is a Darkroot L3 encounter, so the Darkroot encounter cards must be in the pool (darkroot p.6 mixing rules apply to the rest).

sections.name: Section 1 - Darkroot Garden
specialRules: The party proceeds to Section 2 when the specifically named Hydra Lake level-3 encounter is defeated (darkroot p.10). No boss in this section.
After completing Section 1, augment the treasure deck with transposed + legendary treasure cards and reset the play area per 'Setup After the Mini Boss' (core p.9) (darkroot p.10).

scenarios.name: Call of the Abyss
scenarios.encounterDeckNote: Encounters drawn from a shared core+Darkroot deck; L4 encounters from Four Kings (four-kings p.14). Four Kings L4 deck: cursed-cavern, edge-of-the-abyss, hall-of-wraiths (undrawable), new-londo-ruins (undrawable).

sections.name: Section 4 - Penultimate Trial
specialRules: In Section 4 the Mega Boss board (encounter side up) aligns its doorway with a level 3 encounter's doorway rather than the Bonfire tile; flip it after clearing the L4. L4 encounters never reset on bonfire rest (four-kings p.14).
Section 4 has a main boss AFTER an L4 encounter.

sections.name: Section 5 - The Abyss
specialRules: Once defeated, an L4 encounter can never be replayed, and it does not reset when the party rests at the bonfire (four-kings p.8, p.14).

scenarios.knownIssue: Needs 3 distinct Four Kings L4 draws across Sections 4-5, but only 2 of that deck's 4 cards are drawable in this mod (hall-of-wraiths and new-londo-ruins spawn UNKNOWN enemies). See _meta.openIssues.

scenarios.name: Go Beyond Death
scenarios.excludedReason: Unshippable with mod 1210887127: requires the Explorers and Iron Keep enemy sets and the Pursuer main boss, none of which have minis, cards, or decks in the mod (spec section 1, open question 8; enemies.json _missingFromMod). Both prescribed named L4 encounters (fortress-gates, blazing-furnace) are also undrawable - their spawns include UNKNOWN enemies from absent sets. Hidden in the lobby per the spec proposal.
scenarios.encounterDeckNote: Encounters from a shared core+Explorers+Iron Keep deck; L4 encounters from OIK (oik p.14). Explorers and Iron Keep are absent from the mod.

sections.name: Section 3 - Ironhearth Hall
specialRules: During setup for sections 3 and 4 the Mega Boss board (encounter side) aligns with a level 3 encounter's doorway rather than the Bonfire tile; flip after clearing (oik p.14).
Named L4 encounters are prescribed (Fortress Gates, Blazing Furnace), unlike the random draw in the standalone flow (oik p.14-15).

sections.name: Section 4 - Eygil's Idol
specialRules: L4 encounters do not reset on rest (oik p.14).

scenarios.name: Bathed in Flame
scenarios.extendsNote: Designed to bolt onto the end of The First Journey campaign (core p.34-35): play First Journey Sections 1-3, then continue with Section 4 below (kal p.14-15).
scenarios.encounterDeckNote: L4 encounter from the Black Dragon Kalameet L4 deck: perilous-crossing, great-stone-bridge, goughs-perch, royal-woods-passage (undrawable).

sections.name: Section 4 - Royal Wood
specialRules: The Mega Boss board (encounter side) aligns its doorway with a level 3 encounter's doorway rather than the Bonfire tile; flip it once the L4 encounter is defeated. L4 encounters do not reset when the party rests (kal p.15).
